plans.createHint: The Stripe product and monthly price are created automatically — no Stripe dashboard needed.
plans.name: Plan key
plans.nameHint: Internal identifier (lowercase, no spaces). Cannot be changed later.
plans.createFailed: Could not create the plan. Check the values and try again.
plans.archiveBody: "{name}" will be hidden from the subscribe page and closed to new subscribers. Existing subscribers keep their access and billing.
plans.priceChangeNote: Price changes apply to new subscribers only — existing subscribers keep their current price.
plans.editHint: Changes sync to Stripe automatically — no Stripe dashboard needed.
plans.stripePriceIdHint: Managed automatically. Only change this if you created a price in Stripe yourself.
plans.accessHint: These unlock subscriber-gated content on the site.
plans.displayFeaturesHint: Shown as the plan's benefit list on the subscribe page (snake_case keys).
plans.addFeaturePlaceholder: Add benefit key and press Enter…
plans.saveFailed: Could not save the plan. Check the values and try again.

list.title: Subscriptions
list.revokeBody: This will immediately cancel access for {email}.
list.banBody: This immediately cancels {email}'s Stripe billing, revokes their access, and suspends their account so they can no longer sign in.

settings.title: Subscription
settings.successBody: Welcome aboard. You now have full access to everything included in your plan.
settings.gracePeriod: Grace period ends {date}. Renew to keep access.
settings.portalError: Could not open billing portal. Please try again.
settings.noSubscription: You don't have an active subscription.
